issues.description: Condition 'HasRestingDon' checks for resting DON!! cards. Card text says '8 or more DON!! cards on your field' (attached DON!!), not resting. Should be 'HasAttachedDon' with count:8.

Action type 'Rest' sets a character as active (opposite of resting). Card text says 'set up to 1 of your purple {Straw Hat Crew} type Characters... as active', which is correct for Rest action, but the target filter is missing the purple color and {Straw Hat Crew} type requirement.
Target scope 'ChooseOwnCharacter' with maxPower:6000 is incomplete. Must also filter by color:purple and type:{Straw Hat Crew}.
